problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
